name: Golf VX Arlington Heights
address: 644 E Rand Rd, Arlington Heights, IL 60004
about: Golf VX Arlington Heights is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines state-of-the-art simulators with a full-service bar and event space. It offers a premium indoor golf and entertainment destination with climate-controlled bays, private event options, and locally crafted food and drinks. The venue caters to a variety of activities including lessons, leagues, tournaments, and social gatherings, making it accessible for year-round play regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading simulators with AI-powered swing analysis
Year-round climate-controlled play regardless of weather
Full-service bar and kitchen with signature cocktails and food
Spacious, comfortable simulator bays for solo or group play

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with signature cocktails and robotic bartender

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar and kitchen with locally crafted food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A solo 18-hole round takes about an hour. Group sessions may take longer.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior golf clinics and private kids' lessons with certified coaches.
